case_title: SANCHEZ-VERGARA, REBECCA VS V. AND M. GIFT & JEWELERY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT SENT TO MARIA CHAN (V & M GIFT) RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ-VERGARA, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT V. AND M. GIFT & JEWELERY $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,521.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
FORMER ASSIGNEE OF RECORD, RP CONSULTING REASSIGNS JUDGMENT BACK TO CREDITOR. ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT, DELETED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ-VERGARA, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT V. AND M. GIFT & JEWELERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
